title: Add a Tote Back Into the System Using the Add Tote Screen
summary: Use the Add Tote screen and scanner to scan a tote barcode, verify the displayed Tote ID, and execute the tote return so the AGV takes the tote back into the system.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when returning a tote back into the system from the Add Tote screen using the documented scanner workflow at the sorter.
not_for: Do not use this procedure if the tote ID is not displayed correctly on the screen.
Not for tote initialization workflows described in the Tote Initialization Procedure.
Not for removing a tote from the system.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate to the Add Tote screen, scan the tote barcode, verify the displayed Tote ID, and press Confirm & Execute.

safety_notes: Do not proceed if the tote ID is not displayed correctly.
The source does not provide additional recovery or escalation steps beyond verifying the displayed Tote ID.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Add Tote screen

access_required: Access to the Add Tote screen
system_preconditions: A tote barcode is available to scan.
The operator has the documented scanner available.

visual_references.description: Page 93 image tied to sorter scanner operation and nearby Add Tote instructions.
Add Tote screen reference showing the Add Tote HMI and Confirm & Execute workflow.

steps.title: Navigate to the Add Tote screen
steps.purpose: Open the correct screen used to return a tote into the system.
steps.expected_result: The Add Tote screen is open and ready for barcode scanning.
steps.healthy_condition: The Add Tote screen is visible and the tote barcode scan area is available.
steps.failure_condition: The Add Tote screen cannot be accessed or the operator is not on the correct screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Add Tote screen layout and the area used for tote barcode scanning.
The page 93 image associated with the sorter scanner operation and Add Tote workflow.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Add Tote screen cannot be reached.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 4-31, Hospital HMI Add Tote Screen, appears on page 62.

steps.title: Scan the tote barcode
steps.purpose: Provide the tote barcode input needed for the system to identify the tote.
steps.instruction: Scan the tote barcode using the documented scanner.
steps.expected_result: The system receives the tote barcode scan.
steps.healthy_condition: The barcode scan is accepted and the tote information can be reviewed on screen.
steps.failure_condition: The barcode is not successfully scanned or the system does not reflect the scan.

actions.label: Scan tote barcode
actions.exact_action: Scan the tote barcode using the documented scanner.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The scanner-related image associated with the Add Tote workflow.
The Add Tote screen fields populated by scanning the tote barcode.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the tote barcode cannot be scanned.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Scan the tote barcode and verify the tote ID is displayed correctly.
The operator uses the green scanner to scan the tote barcode, which populates the Tote ID and Barcode fields.

steps.title: Verify the displayed Tote ID
steps.purpose: Confirm the scanned tote matches the tote information shown on screen before execution.
steps.instruction: Verify that the tote ID is displayed correctly on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The displayed Tote ID matches the tote that was scanned.
steps.healthy_condition: The Tote ID appears on screen and is correct.
steps.failure_condition: The Tote ID is missing, incorrect, or does not match the tote that was scanned.

actions.label: Check displayed Tote ID
actions.exact_action: Verify that the tote ID is displayed correctly on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Tote ID field and related barcode information on the Add Tote screen.
Where the displayed tote information appears in the Add Tote workflow image.

stop_or_escalate_if: Do not proceed if the tote ID is not displayed correctly.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Verify the tote ID is displayed correctly.
The tote barcode scan populates the Tote ID and Barcode fields.

steps.title: Confirm and execute the tote return
steps.purpose: Submit the verified tote return so the system sends the tote back into operation.
steps.expected_result: The tote return is executed and the AGV takes the tote back into the system.
steps.healthy_condition: The command is accepted and the AGV takes the tote back into the system.
steps.failure_condition: The command is not accepted or the tote is not taken back into the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Confirm & Execute control on the Add Tote screen.
The image associated with the final confirmation step for returning the tote.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Tote ID was not verified as correct before pressing Confirm & Execute.
Escalate if the tote is not taken back into the system after execution.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press Confirm & Execute. The AGV will take the tote back into the system.
The operator presses Confirm & Execute after the tote barcode is scanned and fields are populated.

success_criteria: The tote barcode is scanned successfully.
The displayed Tote ID is correct.
The AGV takes the tote back into the system.
healthy_conditions: The Add Tote screen is accessible.
The tote barcode scan is accepted.
The Tote ID is displayed correctly on the screen.
The AGV takes the tote back into the system after execution.
failure_conditions: The Add Tote screen cannot be accessed.
The tote barcode cannot be scanned.
The Tote ID is not displayed correctly.
The tote is not taken back into the system after Confirm & Execute.
escalation_guidance: Do not proceed if the tote ID is not displayed correctly.
If the tote is not taken back into the system after Confirm & Execute, escalate for SME review because the source does not provide additional recovery steps.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Sorter scanner operation image associated with the Add Tote workflow.
Add Tote screen, Tote ID field, barcode-related fields, and Confirm & Execute control.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Navigate to the "Add Tote" screen. Scan the tote barcode and verify the tote ID is displayed correctly. Press Confirm & Execute. The AGV will take the tote back into the system.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide a time estimate.
The source packet does not provide explicit production stop or LOTO requirements.
The source packet does not provide detailed recovery steps if scanning fails or execution does not complete.
The source packet does not explicitly define navigation path details for reaching the Add Tote screen in this sorter workflow.
